name: Brisket Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl to create the marinade.
2. Place the brisket (approximately 10 pounds) into a large resealable plastic bag or container with enough marinade to cover the meat completely.
3. Seal the bag or cover the container, ensuring the brisket is fully submerged in the marinade.
4. Refrigerate the brisket for at least 12 hours, ideally overnight, allowing the flavors to penetrate and tenderize the meat.
5. When ready to cook, remove the brisket from the marinade (reserving the remaining sauce for flavoring the cooking liquid if desired) and proceed with your preferred cooking method.
